name: Individual

compliance_labels.name: Data Ownership
compliance_labels.description: Your conversations, health data, and personal information belong to you — not the model provider

compliance_labels.name: Right to Explanation
compliance_labels.description: When AI makes decisions about you, you have the right to understand why

compliance_labels.name: Local Processing
compliance_labels.description: Sensitive queries processed on local hardware — never sent to a remote API

compliance_labels.name: No Profiling
compliance_labels.description: Your usage patterns and prompts are not used to train models or build profiles

recommended_models.name: Granite 3B
recommended_models.reason: Small enough to run on personal hardware, open weights, no usage telemetry

recommended_models.name: Phi-3 Mini
recommended_models.reason: 3.8B parameters, runs on consumer hardware, strong reasoning

key_concern: Every time you ask a cloud AI a question, someone else stores your prompt, processes your data on their infrastructure, and may use your interactions to improve their model. Citizen sovereignty means your AI conversations are private and local.
aibom_requirements: Model must be runnable on consumer hardware (CPU, <16GB RAM)
No telemetry or usage reporting to third parties
Training data must not include scraped personal data without consent
Model must support user's local language
